response.body: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?><EquipmentDetail><EquipmentId>160.002/3</EquipmentId><Manufacturer>Acme Marine Safety Inc.</Manufacturer><ModelNumber>LifeRing-Pro-30</ModelNumber><ApprovalStatus>Approved</ApprovalStatus><ApprovalDate>2022-04-15</ApprovalDate><EquipmentType>Life Saving Equipment</EquipmentType><Description>30-inch life ring buoy approved per 46 CFR 160.002.
